code:
fn double_positive(_ n: Int) -> Result<Int, String>
  if n > 0
    Ok(n * 2)
  else
    Err("non-positive")
  end
end

fn add_ten(_ n: Int) -> Result<Int, String>
  Ok(n + 10)
end

fn run(_ n: Int) -> Unit
  let r1 = double_positive(n)
  match r1
  when Ok(v)
    let r2 = add_ten(v)
    match r2
    when Ok(result)
      print("result=#{result}")
    when Err(msg)
      print("error=#{msg}")
    end
  when Err(msg)
    print("error=#{msg}")
  end
end

run(5)
run(-3)
